message:
🌱 contour: Support adding / removing headers (#1241)

* 🌱 Add contour: Support adding / removing headers mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct contour namespace to projectcontour

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "contour-70-support-adding-removing-headers",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: Support adding / removing headers",
+    "description": "Support adding / removing headers. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n projectcontour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\nAdd support for adding / removing headers at the Ingress, namespace, and default level"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support adding / removing headers",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\napiVersion: extensions/v1beta1\nkind: Ingress\nmetadata:\n  name: example\n  annotations:\n    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-add: |\n      Strict-Transport-Security \"max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains\"\n      Public-Key-Pins: max-age=2592000; pin-sha256=\"E9CZ9INDbd+2eRQozYqqbQ2yXLVKB9+xcprMF+44U1g=\"\n    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-remove: |\n      X-Powered-By\nspec:\n  ...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n projectcontour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support adding / removing headers\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/pull/407",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1\nkind: Ingress\nmetadata:\n  name: example\n  annotations:\n    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-add: |\n      Strict-Transport-Security \"max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains\"\n      Public-Key-Pins: max-age=2592000; pin-sha256=\"E9CZ9INDbd+2eRQozYqqbQ2yXLVKB9+xcprMF+44U1g=\"\n    contour.heptio.com/response-headers-to-remove: |\n      X-Powered-By\nspec:\n  ...",
+        "spec:\n  routes:\n    prefix: /foo\n      headers:\n        add:\n        - name: \"x-request-id\"\n           value: \"fixed value\"\n        - name: \"x-something\"\n           value: \"another fixed value\"\n       remove:\n       - name: \"Date\"\n       - name: \"ETag\"",
+        "l5d-dst-override: $service_name.$namespace.svc.cluster.local:80"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "contour",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "contour"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/issues/70",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/pull/407"
+    },
+    "reactions": 12,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with contour installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T06:37:48.355Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+}
